title: Braised Beans in Savory Dutch Broth
description: A hearty, comforting dish that combines the rich flavors of Dutch cuisine with the simplicity of Chinese braising techniques.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat. Add garlic and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add onions and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add spicy paste (if using) and cook for 1 minute.
Add long beans, broth, salt, and pepper. Bring to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes, or until beans are tender.
Season with additional salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs (optional).
